name: GOLFTEC Brecksville
about: GOLFTEC Brecksville is a golf training center that provides lessons, club fitting, and practice facilities using advanced technology. They offer personalized coaching, custom club fitting, and access to practice bays equipped with launch monitors and simulator technology. The center is designed to help golfers of all skill levels improve their game through data-driven instruction and practice sessions with tailored membership plans.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including launch monitors and OPTIMOTION swing tracking
Custom club fitting with a Shaft Wall and equipment from top brands
Personalized coaching with detailed video analysis and data feedback

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you don't need to bring your own clubs. GOLFTEC provides club fitting services and you can use their equipment during lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed at GOLFTEC Brecksville.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole simulation is not specified on the website, but it typically depends on the simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC Brecksville offers youth golf lessons with 30% off for juniors under 18, making it kid-friendly.
